headline: Child Vaccination Rate Drops to 88% Below Herd Immunity Threshold
context: National Immunisation Programme coverage for children under 2 fell below the 95% threshold for herd immunity in 2025.

cards.big: Childhood vaccination rate dropped to 88% in 2025 below the 95% herd immunity target
cards.sub: Anti-vaccine sentiment and access gaps both contribute to declining coverage

cards.big: Anti-vaccine social media content in Bahasa Malaysia increased 340% from 2022 to 2025
cards.sub: Misinformation spread through WhatsApp groups and TikTok reaches millions of parents

cards.big: Measles cases tripled from 186 in 2023 to 558 in 2025 as coverage declined
cards.sub: Disease resurgence directly correlates with falling vaccination rates

cards.big: France made 11 childhood vaccines mandatory in 2018 raising coverage from 83% to 96%
cards.sub: Mandatory vaccination with school enrollment requirement achieved rapid improvement

cards.big: Vaccine hesitancy is not a personal choice issue—it is a public health emergency
Should Malaysia make childhood vaccination mandatory for school enrollment
